title: R Version
description: Output the current R version information using R.version.string.
problemStatement:
Check your environment! Write a code snippet that prints the current R version using the `R.version.string` variable.

**Requirement:** Just print the value of `R.version.string`.
hints: R stores its version information in a built-in list called `R.version`.
expectedOutput: The current R version string (e.g., "R version 4.3.0 (2023-04-21)")
